# Krunal Badami
> Software Architect & Engineering Manager | React Native, Roku/BrightScript, OTT Expert

Krunal Badami is a senior technical leader with 8+ years of experience architecting and delivering high-scale digital products (2M+ monthly users). He specializes in cross-platform mobile (React Native), smart TV ecosystems (Roku, Apple TV, Android TV), and high-performance frontend systems.

## Roles
- Software Architect
- Engineering Manager
- Tech Lead
- VP of Engineering / IT Lead

## Global Availability
- Regions: US, UK, European Union (Germany, Poland), Australia, India (Mumbai, Bangalore).
- Availability: Remote, Hybrid, On-site leadership.

## Technical Expertise
- **Mobile**: React Native, Native Modules, Performance, Security, Foldable Device Detection.
- **TV & OTT**: Roku/BrightScript, SceneGraph, HLS, DASH, DRM (Widevine/PlayReady/FairPlay), Chromecast, AirPlay.
- **Web**: React.js, Next.js, SSR, GraphQL.
- **Languages**: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Node.js, Shell Script, YAML.
- **Infrastructure**: CI/CD (GitHub Actions, Fastlane), AWS, GCP.

## Key Impacts
- Led delivery for **The Daily Wire**, **PragerU**, **28 by Evie**, and **Big Time Rush**.
- Published **7 Open Source Libraries** on npm (2M+ downloads).
- Reduced bundle sizes by **35%** and production incidents by **40%**.
- Architected **7 platform parity** (iOS, Android, Roku, Apple TV, Android TV, Fire TV, Web).
